case_title: BLUME CAROLINE VS LAKE MERCED BOATING AND FISHING COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,512.50 FILED BY BLUME CAROLINE AS TO DEFENDANT LAKE MERCED BOATING AND FISHING COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-11-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BLUME CAROLINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAKE MERCED BOATING AND FISHING COMPANY $37.50 PRINCIPAL, $45.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $83.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LAKE MERCED BOATING AND FISHING COMPANY
